title: IIEST Shibpur Temporary Doctor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
org: Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology Shibpur (IIEST Shibpur)
shortInfo: Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology Shibpur (IIEST Shibpur) has released the official Temporary Doctor Notification 2026 on 02 May 2026 at IIEST Shibpur Official Website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the IIEST Shibpur Temporary Doctor Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with MBBS Degree or equivalent qualification and registration in State Medical Register or Indian Medical Register can apply online till 11 June 2026. The maximum age limit is 60 years. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

basic_details.job_title: IIEST Shibpur Temporary Doctor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology Shibpur (IIEST Shibpur)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology Shibpur (IIEST Shibpur) has released the official Temporary Doctor Notification 2026 on 02 May 2026 at IIEST Shibpur Official Website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the IIEST Shibpur Temporary Doctor Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with MBBS Degree or equivalent qualification and registration in State Medical Register or Indian Medical Register can apply online till 11 June 2026. The maximum age limit is 60 years. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 60 years Age relaxation will be provided as per Central Government Rules applicable for the institute.

qualification.details: Temporary Doctor: MBBS Degree or equivalent qualification included in any one of the Schedules to the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956 and must be registered in a State Medical Register or Indian Medical Register. Desirable: Post Graduate Qualification, preferably MD in General Medicine, or equivalent qualification included in any one of the Schedules to the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956 and must be registered in a State Medical Register or Indian Medical Register.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIEST Shibpur Temporary Doctor Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 11-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIEST Shibpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIEST Shibpur Temporary Doctor post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Temporary Doctor post at IIEST Shibpur is 11th June 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Temporary Doctor position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS Degree or equivalent qualification and be registered with a State Medical Register or Indian Medical Register. A desirable qualification is an MD in General Medicine or an equivalent postgraduate degree.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Temporary Doctor recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Temporary Doctor position is 60 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the Central Government Rules applicable to the institute.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Temporary Doctor post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 70,000/- per month, which is all-inclusive.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Temporary Doctor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Temporary Doctor at IIEST Shibpur.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the Temporary Doctor recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 1000/- for General/OBC candidates and Rs. 500/- for SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Screening Test, followed by a Presentation, and finally an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity for the post of Temporary Doctor at IIEST Shibpur.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the Temporary Doctor position?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website of IIEST Shibpur or via the direct application link provided in the "Important Links" section, on or before the last date of application.
